name: insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month, inefficient processing causes delays in claims resolution. We automate document digitization and form population instead of manual data entry and document handling.
problem_solved: Inefficient processing of paper documents leads to delays in claims resolution.
